heading: Why Manimaran Palgova?
description: At Manimaran, Palgova is not just a sweet — it is a tradition perfected over generations. Made using fresh milk and slow-cooked with care, our Palgova delivers an authentic taste that reflects purity, patience, and passion.. From everyday cravings to special occasions, Manimaran Palgova stands for quality you can trust and taste you can remember.
box1_text: Time-honored recipes passed down through generations for an authentic taste.
